notes:
Watermark Lab 2.0.1 - refinements and fixes.

What's new:
- Switch between the new and classic interface from the app - your choice is remembered
- Browse dialogs reopen at your last folder (Documents by default)
- The window now comes to the front on launch and when you switch interface
- New 'Export PDF Only' button - exports just the PDF and tidies up the intermediate Office file

Fixes:
- OneDrive-safe PowerPoint saving now also applies in the classic interface
- Classic interface uses the proper app icon
- Cleaner preset list and a gold (no longer blue) dropdown highlight

Upgrading: existing users are offered this update automatically - click Yes to install; your presets and recent files are kept.
